response.overview: One of the issues currently gaining attention among young people is climate change that happens suddenly, abruptly, and unexpectedly. The younger generation is among the groups most vulnerable to the negative impacts of climate change. This can place a burden on their quality of life and mental health. In addition, data from the World Bank states that one in seven young people in Indonesia is unemployed and facing financial pressure. It is this double burden that becomes the main focus of our film, which carries the theme of social justice for all Indonesians.
response.title: Hari Sial
